title: Taboo Disco Club — Fiesta Inclusiva
description: Club nocturno inclusivo y LGBTQ+ friendly en Getsemani, Calle 24 #10-55. Reggaeton, latin pop y crossover. Abierto todas las noches de 8pm a 3am. Especiales diarios hasta las 11pm con descuentos en bebidas. Precios accesibles, seguridad profesional.
description_en: Inclusive and LGBTQ+ friendly nightclub in Getsemani, Calle 24 #10-55. Reggaeton, Latin pop, and crossover. Open nightly 8pm to 3am. Daily specials until 11pm with drink discounts. Affordable prices, professional security.
